text.tspan: 10:00 AM Change and Get Ready For The Day
5:10 PM Go back home and eat my food
I first start my day by waking up at 9 AM
I then usually scroll on my phone on my bed for 10-15 minutes before I
decide to get out of my bed.
At 920 AM I will then get into my shower for around 10 minutes.
930 AM I will get dressed for the day. 935
AM is when I finally start my breakfast with eggs and toast.
I will eat my breakfast until 1010 AM.
At 1010 Am I will brush my teeth
and do whatever else I need to get ready for class
At 1025 AM I just watch whatever is on TV or go on my phone
I will finally leave my apartment at around 1045 AM.
AM I arrive to ART449 Advanced Typography.
I start to work on the next assignment
gave to use in class or listen to Professor Stairs give a lesson for about 30 minutes.
At 12 PM I usually get up out of seat to
move around a little bit and get something to eat from the vending machine
At 1205 or 1210 PM I get back into my seat to
At 1 PM is when I leave ART 449.
105 PM I arrive back into my car in the CMU parking

tspan.tspan: 9 AM Wake up
9 AM - 9 15AM scroll on my phone 9 20 AM - 9 30 AM Shower
9 30 AM - 9 35 AM Change and decide what to wear
9 40 AM - 10 10AM Make breakfast with eggs and toast
and talk to my roommates who are there
10 15 AM - 10 25AM I brush my and get full ready

9 AM Wake up
9 AM - 9 15AM scroll on my phone
9 20 AM - 9 30 AM Get into the Shower
9 30 AM - 9 35 AM Change and decide what to wear
9 40 AM - 10 10AM Make breakfast with eggs and toast
10 15 AM - 10 25AM I brush my teeth and get fully ready

text.tspan: go to a gas station to get a
and then finally leave for school
10 55 AM arrive in the school parking lot

tspan.tspan: 11 AM go to class for ART 449 Adanced
my next project that is due
12 PM Find a vending
machine for a snack
1 PM Leave class
1 15 PM Go get
fast food
2 PM Go to ART 358 Digital Design to work on app
3 30 PM Go take a break and move around for a little bit
3 40 - 4 45 PM Trying to make more progress on the design
4 45 PM Leave class and head for the gym to workout or play Bball
5 PM - 6 30 PM Workout at the
gym while I am slowly dying of exhausting
6 40 PM Get back home finally to shower and change before I can eat
7 00 PM Start making dinner with something easy to cook like spaghetti
7 45 PM Finish cooking and eating dinner after an average meal probably
8 PM Go to my room and dreadfully work on some homework that is due
10 PM- 12 PM Play on Xbox with my friends until I get too too tired
12 PM - 12 15 AM Brush my teeth and wash my face before bed
12 30 AM Go to bed
scroll on my phone
and go to sleep
